all.en: Every Lunar New Year, my mother spends days preparing the reunion dinner.
all.zh: 每逢農曆新年，媽媽會花好幾天準備團圓飯。

all.en: This year, my aunt and her family are flying in all the way from Canada.
all.zh: 今年，我阿姨一家從加拿大遠道飛回來。

all.en: When they arrived at the airport, my cousins barely recognized me.
all.zh: 他們抵達機場時，表哥表姐幾乎認不出我了。

all.en: At home, the smell of braised pork and steamed fish filled every room.
all.zh: 在家裡，紅燒肉和清蒸魚的香味瀰漫每個房間。

all.en: Grandma handed out red envelopes and asked us about our studies and jobs.
all.zh: 奶奶發紅包，並詢問我們的學業與工作狀況。

all.en: We toasted with grape juice and warm rice wine before the meal began.
all.zh: 開飯前，我們以葡萄汁和溫熱的米酒互相敬酒。

all.en: My uncle told stories about his first year living overseas, which made everyone laugh.
all.zh: 舅舅分享他在海外第一年的趣事，逗得大家哈哈大笑。

all.en: After dinner, the children rushed outside to set off small firecrackers.
all.zh: 晚飯後，孩子們衝到屋外放小鞭炮。

all.en: We stayed up late playing card games and watching the variety show on TV.
all.zh: 我們熬夜玩撲克牌，並觀看電視上的綜藝節目。

all.en: Before bed, I felt grateful that our scattered family was finally under one roof.
all.zh: 睡前，我衷心感謝這個四散的家庭終於齊聚一堂。

all.en: The next morning, the entire family squeezed around the breakfast table together.
all.zh: 隔天早晨，全家人擠在早餐桌邊一起用餐。

all.en: Grandma served us hot soy milk, fried dough sticks, and her homemade radish cake.
all.zh: 奶奶端上了熱豆漿、油條，還有她親手做的蘿蔔糕。

all.en: My cousins were amazed by how spicy Taiwanese pickled vegetables could really be.
all.zh: 表哥表姐對台灣醃菜竟然能這麼辣感到驚訝。

all.en: After breakfast, we visited the temple to pray for health and good luck.
all.zh: 早餐後，我們去廟裡祈求健康與好運。

all.en: The streets near the temple were packed with vendors selling sweet rice cakes.
all.zh: 廟附近的街道擠滿了賣甜年糕的攤販。

all.en: My aunt bought small toys for the children and bargained politely with each seller.
all.zh: 阿姨為孩子們買了小玩具，並禮貌地與每位攤商討價還價。

all.en: In the afternoon, we drove to the countryside to visit my grandfather's grave.
all.zh: 下午，我們開車到鄉下祭拜爺爺的墓。

all.en: My father shared old stories about how strict and kind grandfather had once been.
all.zh: 爸爸分享了爺爺當年既嚴格又慈祥的種種往事。

all.en: That evening, we ate dumplings shaped like ancient gold ingots for extra fortune.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我們吃了形似古代金元寶的水餃，象徵額外的好運。

all.en: Before sleeping, my mother whispered that this had been her happiest New Year yet.
all.zh: 睡前，媽媽輕聲說，這是她迄今為止最幸福的一個新年。

all.en: On the third day of the holiday, my cousins wanted to try Taiwanese night markets.
all.zh: 假期第三天，表哥表姐想體驗台灣的夜市。

all.en: We took the train to the famous market near the old harbor district.
all.zh: 我們搭火車前往老港區附近那個著名的市集。

all.en: They were astonished by the variety of street snacks lined up under colorful lights.
all.zh: 五彩燈光下排排的街頭小吃種類繁多，令他們嘆為觀止。

all.en: My younger cousin bravely tried stinky tofu and gave it an enthusiastic thumbs up.
all.zh: 我的小表弟勇敢地嘗了臭豆腐，並豎起大拇指大力稱讚。

all.en: We played carnival games and won a giant stuffed bear for my niece.
all.zh: 我們玩了園遊會遊戲，幫我姪女贏得一隻巨大的玩偶熊。

all.en: My uncle generously paid for all the snacks, refusing to accept any contribution.
all.zh: 舅舅大方地請了所有的小吃錢，堅持不肯收任何分擔。

all.en: On the way home, we stopped for shaved ice with fresh mango and condensed milk.
all.zh: 回程的路上，我們停下來吃了淋上煉乳的新鮮芒果剉冰。

all.en: Back at home, my mother insisted everyone soak their tired feet in warm herbal water.
all.zh: 回到家後，媽媽堅持要大家用溫熱的草藥水泡泡疲憊的雙腳。

all.en: My aunt sighed deeply and said she had missed these small comforts more than anything.
all.zh: 阿姨深深嘆了口氣，說她最想念的就是這些微小的舒適感。

all.en: As they packed for Canada, I quietly slipped homemade pineapple cakes into their suitcases.
all.zh: 當他們收行李準備回加拿大時，我悄悄塞了自製的鳳梨酥到行李箱裡。

all.en: A week after they left, my aunt sent photos of the cakes arriving safely in Toronto.
all.zh: 他們離開一週後，阿姨傳來鳳梨酥平安抵達多倫多的照片。

all.en: My cousins shared the pineapple cakes with their classmates, who all loved the buttery flavor.
all.zh: 表哥表姐把鳳梨酥分給同學們，大家都喜愛那濃郁的奶油味。

all.en: They started planning their next visit to Taiwan during the summer school break.
all.zh: 他們開始計畫在暑假再度回台灣探親。

all.en: My mother already began listing dishes she wanted to cook for the next reunion.
all.zh: 媽媽已經開始列出下次團圓飯她想做的菜色清單。

all.en: Grandma video-called my younger cousin nearly every Sunday to practice Mandarin together.
all.zh: 奶奶幾乎每個週日都跟小表弟視訊，一起練習中文。

all.en: My uncle promised to teach my brother how to fish during their upcoming summer trip.
all.zh: 舅舅承諾下次暑假旅行時要教我弟弟釣魚。

all.en: Through these regular calls, our scattered family stayed surprisingly close despite the long distance.
all.zh: 透過這些定期通話，我們四散的家人即使相隔遙遠仍意外地保持親近。

all.en: In summer, my aunt's family returned earlier than expected to surprise grandma on her birthday.
all.zh: 夏天時，阿姨一家比預計提早回來，給奶奶一個生日驚喜。

all.en: We celebrated with a huge red bean cake and lit candles shaped like little peaches.
all.zh: 我們以一個巨大的紅豆蛋糕慶祝，點燃了形似小桃子的蠟燭。

all.en: Grandma blew out the candles slowly and whispered her wish for many more reunions ahead.
all.zh: 奶奶緩緩吹熄蠟燭，輕聲許下未來能有更多次團聚的願望。

all.en: After her birthday celebration, grandma announced she wanted to write a family cookbook this year.
all.zh: 生日慶祝過後，奶奶宣布今年想動手寫一本家族食譜書。

all.en: She invited every relative to contribute one recipe along with a meaningful family story.
all.zh: 她邀請每位親戚提供一道食譜，並附上一段有意義的家族故事。

all.en: My aunt sent recipes from Canada that her children loved during cold winter evenings.
all.zh: 阿姨從加拿大寄來她孩子們在寒冬夜晚最愛的幾道食譜。

all.en: My mother carefully tested each dish and adjusted measurements for younger cooks to follow.
all.zh: 母親仔細試做每道菜，並為較年輕的廚師調整份量比例。

all.en: My uncle contributed his secret braised pork sauce, which had been passed down four generations.
all.zh: 舅舅貢獻了他祖傳四代的紅燒肉祕方醬汁。

all.en: My younger cousin took beautiful photographs of every dish for the printed cookbook.
all.zh: 小表弟為每道菜拍下美麗的照片，準備收錄進印刷版食譜中。

all.en: We finished compiling the book just before the next Lunar New Year reunion arrived.
all.zh: 我們在下一個農曆新年團圓飯前夕，剛好完成了食譜彙編。

all.en: Grandma cried happily as she flipped through the first printed copy in her hands.
all.zh: 奶奶手捧著第一本印好的食譜翻閱時，幸福地流下淚水。

all.en: Every family received a copy, along with a handwritten dedication from grandma herself.
all.zh: 每個家庭都收到一本，並附有奶奶親筆書寫的題詞。

all.en: That year's reunion dinner felt extra special, with three generations cooking together side by side.
all.zh: 那年的團圓飯格外特別，三代人並肩在廚房裡一起下廚。

all.en: By the spring after the cookbook launch, my aunt invited all of us to visit Toronto in summer.
all.zh: 食譜出版後的春天，阿姨邀請我們所有人在夏天到多倫多探訪。

all.en: Grandma hesitated at first because she had never flown on such a long international flight before.
all.zh: 奶奶起初猶豫，因為她從未搭過如此長途的國際航班。

all.en: We booked a comfortable seat near the window and helped her prepare for the long journey.
all.zh: 我們為她訂了靠窗的舒適座位，並協助她為長途旅程做好準備。

all.en: When we landed, my aunt and her children waited at the gate with a giant homemade banner.
all.zh: 我們抵達時，阿姨和她的孩子們舉著一面巨大的手作橫幅在閘口等候。

all.en: Grandma cried softly when she finally hugged her grandchildren on Canadian soil for the first time.
all.zh: 奶奶在加拿大的土地上第一次擁抱孫子們時，悄悄流下了淚水。

all.en: We spent two weeks cooking recipes from the cookbook in my aunt's bright lakeside kitchen.
all.zh: 我們花了兩週時間，在阿姨明亮的湖畔廚房裡，烹煮食譜中的料理。

all.en: Grandma taught the neighbors how to fold dumplings, and they returned with maple syrup pancakes.
all.zh: 奶奶教鄰居們如何包水餃，他們則回贈了楓糖薄煎餅。

all.en: On the last evening, we held a small lantern festival by the quiet lake behind the house.
all.zh: 最後一個晚上，我們在屋後寧靜的湖邊舉辦了一場小型的燈籠節。

all.en: Each family member released a paper lantern carrying a wish for the years still to come.
all.zh: 每位家人都放飛一盞紙燈籠，承載著對未來歲月的願望。

all.en: Watching the lanterns rise above two countries, I realized our family had truly become one again.
all.zh: 看著燈籠在兩個國家上空升起，我體會到我們的家庭已真正再次合而為一。

all.en: After returning from Toronto, grandma began writing weekly letters to every grandchild across the world.
all.zh: 從多倫多回來後，奶奶開始每週寫信給世界各地的每個孫子孫女。

all.en: She filled each letter with old proverbs, cooking tips, and warm encouragements for the week ahead.
all.zh: 她在每封信中寫滿老諺語、烹飪心得，以及對未來一週的溫暖鼓勵。

all.en: My younger cousin saved every letter inside a wooden box decorated with painted plum blossoms.
all.zh: 小表弟把每封信都收進一個彩繪梅花的木盒裡珍藏。

all.en: By autumn, grandma surprised everyone by enrolling in a basic computer class at the community center.
all.zh: 到了秋天，奶奶報名社區中心的基礎電腦課，讓大家驚喜不已。

all.en: She wanted to learn email so she could share recipe updates with relatives more quickly.
all.zh: 她想學電子郵件，這樣就能更快與親戚分享更新的食譜。

all.en: Within months, grandma was sending photos of garden vegetables to my aunt in Toronto.
all.zh: 幾個月內，奶奶就能將自家菜園的蔬菜照片寄給多倫多的阿姨。

all.en: My aunt replied with videos of her children learning to grow basil on a sunny balcony.
all.zh: 阿姨回傳了她孩子們在陽光充足的陽台上學種羅勒的影片。

all.en: When the next reunion came around, grandma proudly presented a tablet full of family memories.
all.zh: 下一次團圓時，奶奶驕傲地拿出一台裝滿家族回憶的平板電腦。

all.en: She had organized hundreds of photos into albums labeled by year, season, and special holiday.
all.zh: 她已將數百張照片整理成依年份、季節與特別節日分類的相簿。

all.en: Sitting around the warm table together, I realized that every reunion only deepens our shared roots.
all.zh: 圍著溫暖的餐桌而坐，我體會到每一次團聚都讓我們共同的根更加深厚。

all.en: Inspired by grandma's tablet project, our youngest cousins began recording short interviews with all elderly relatives.
all.zh: 受奶奶的平板計畫啟發，最小的表弟妹們開始為所有年長親戚錄製簡短的訪談影片。

all.en: They asked questions about childhood games, wartime memories, and the first dish each elder had ever cooked.
all.zh: 他們詢問童年遊戲、戰時回憶，以及每位長輩平生煮過的第一道菜。

all.en: My uncle revealed he had once dreamed of becoming a violinist before family responsibilities quietly changed everything.
all.zh: 舅舅透露他曾夢想成為小提琴家，後來家庭責任悄悄改變了一切。

all.en: Grandma surprised us by singing an old lullaby her mother had taught her ninety quiet years ago.
all.zh: 奶奶讓我們驚喜地唱起一首她母親在九十個安靜年頭前教給她的搖籃曲。

all.en: We compiled every interview into a small documentary shown only at our private family Lunar New Year gathering.
all.zh: 我們把每一段訪談彙整成一部小型紀錄片，只在我們私下的農曆新年家庭聚會上放映。

all.en: Several relatives cried softly when they recognized voices of loved ones who had passed away long ago.
all.zh: 好幾位親戚在認出多年前已故親人的聲音時，靜靜地流下眼淚。

all.en: My aunt suggested mailing copies to relatives we had lost contact with in three other distant countries.
all.zh: 阿姨建議把副本寄給我們已失聯、住在另外三個遙遠國家的親戚。

all.en: Within months, two long-lost cousins reached out, eager to reconnect with our growing scattered family circle.
all.zh: 幾個月內，兩位失聯已久的表親聯繫了我們，渴望與我們日漸壯大的散居家族重新連結。

all.en: Next Lunar New Year, twenty-eight family members from six countries will gather under grandma's beloved roof.
all.zh: 明年農曆新年，將有來自六個國家的二十八位家人，齊聚在奶奶深愛的屋簷下。

all.en: Family, I now understand, is simply a long quiet story we keep retelling with new gentle voices.
all.zh: 我如今明白，家就是一個長長安靜的故事，由我們以溫柔的新聲音不斷重新訴說。
